name: Do I need a lawyer for my occupational illness claim after talking to the adjuster in Murray?
description: Yes if denied or complex; avoid adjuster traps alone.[4]

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for my occupational illness claim after talking to the adjuster in Murray?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes if denied or complex; avoid adjuster traps alone.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Not always, but recommended if denied, complex, or pre-existing issues; adjusters protect insurer interests.[4] Utah allows insurer exams but limits to one usually.[4] Key factors: (1) Avoid uncooperative denial by attending; (2) Don’t sign without review; (3) Appeals need expertise.[4][8] Get free consult before settling; protects max benefits.[1] Self-handling risks underpayment.
